title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Porter Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Porter Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Porter Advisory Limited family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Porter Advisory Limited:
Porter Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Porter Advisory Limited!
